response: The movie starring Melissa McCarthy that features a character named Slimer is "Ghostbusters: Answer the Call" (2016), which is part of the "Ghostbusters" franchise. In this film, Slimer is a character who appears in the films "Ghostbusters" (1984), "Ghostbusters II" (1989), and "Ghostbusters: Answer the Call" (2016), and is voiced by Ivan Reitman and Adam Ray in the films and by Frank Welker in the cartoon series.
